list.title: Product catalog
list.intro: Mass Flow Controllers and Mass Flow Meters across analogue, digital, and specialized series. {count} models engineered for laboratory, industrial, and process applications.

analogue.title: Analogue series
analogue.lede: Proven analogue mass flow controllers and meters.

digital.title: Digital series
digital.lede: 8-point linearization. ±0.25% F.S. accuracy. Sub-second response. RS-485 / Modbus RTU.

specialized.title: Specialized series
specialized.lede: Display-integrated, explosion-proof, and MEMS variants for demanding environments.

products.emptyStack: No products in this category yet.

overview.heading: Overview
overview.sub: Engineered for precision processes that need long-term stability and fast response.

specs.heading: Technical specifications
specs.sub: Reference values measured at 25°C, N₂ basis, unless otherwise noted.

dimensions.heading: Outline dimensions
dimensions.sub: Units in mm. Reference dimensions for 1/4" VCR fittings.
dimensions.caption: Flow direction left → right. Model name engraved on the top face.
dimensions.note: Drawing is for reference only. Refer to the datasheet for the official outline.

downloads.heading: Downloads
downloads.sub: Latest revisions only. Request historical files via the contact form.
